powers.power2: Photon beam projection — can fire concentrated light blasts
powers.power3: Flight at speeds up to Mach 3 in atmosphere
powers.power4: Thermokinesis — can raise or lower temperature within 30 feet
powers.power5: Healing factor — sunlight accelerates her cellular regeneration
powers.power6: Luminous shield — generates a defensive aura of hardened light

weaknesses.weakness1: Prolonged darkness drains her powers within 6 hours
weaknesses.weakness2: Extremely cold environments slow her reflexes and reduce output
weaknesses.weakness3: Overloading her energy reserves causes temporary blindness
